cover.subtitle:
한국 최초의 보통선거,
198명 제헌의원 선출.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a wooden ballot box with a single hand (man's sleeve) inserting a folded paper ballot, viewed from the side. Behind it: a small line of Korean civilians waiting to vote — men in dopo and women in white hanbok. Background: a polling station with a Korean flag silhouette on the wall (no readable details). Color: warm gray base + red flag accent + small blue armband on a UNTCOK observer figure to the side. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 유엔 총회, 인구 비례 남북 총선거 결의.
유엔 소총회, 가능 지역 선거 결의.

outro.tip_headline:
"인구비례 → 소총회"
남한 단독 결의 흐름을 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 유엔 총회·소총회 결의의 차이, 김구의 남북협상 참가 시점, 제헌헌법의 간선제 구조, 5·10이 한국 최초 보통선거라는 사실이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small ballot box silhouette with a folded paper ticket. Cream #F5EFE4 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
